mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN gbl.team_side = 'AWAY' THEN g.home_team ELSE g.away_team END AS opponent, COUNT(DISTINCT gbl.game_id) AS games, SUM(at_bats) AS atBats, SUM(hits) AS hits, SUM(rbi) AS rbi, SUM(walks) AS walks, ROUND(SUM(hits) * 1.0 / NULLIF(SUM(at_bats), 0), 3) AS avg FROM game_batter_log gbl JOIN game g ON g.id = gbl.game_id WHERE gbl.player_name = #{playerName} GROUP BY opponent ORDER BY avg DESC

SELECT p.id AS player_id, COALESCE(SUM(bl.at_bats), 0) AS total_at_bats, COALESCE(SUM(bl.hits), 0) AS total_hits, COUNT(DISTINCT bl.game_id) AS game_count FROM player p JOIN game_batter_log bl ON bl.player_name = p.name JOIN game g ON g.id = bl.game_id AND ( (bl.team_side = 'AWAY' AND g.away_team = p.team) OR (bl.team_side = 'HOME' AND g.home_team = p.team) ) WHERE p.id = #{playerId} GROUP BY p.id
